_help.image_dir: Last opened image folder (auto-saved, no need to edit manually)
_help.save_dir: Label storage folder (auto-saved, no need to edit manually)
_help.nav_keys: Key scheme for switching images | options: 'arrows' (default, ← →) or 'ad' (A D keys)
_help.annotate_batch_size: Images per QThread batch for Auto Annotate (default: 400, reduce if it crashes)
_help.playback_cache: Model Check: cache inference results to .mc_cache/ for fast video playback (default: false)
_help.last_image: Last viewed image filename (auto-saved, used for session restore)
